events.organizer: Department of Theater, Dance, and Performance Studies (TDPS)
events.description: A play inviting to embrace human existence, explore who we are becoming, and relish the fire and messiness of love.

events.description: Faculty members perform a recital.

events.title: TDPS presents “The Philippine Deep” By Abigail De Kosnik
events.organizer: Department of Theater, Dance, and Performance Studies (TDPS)
events.description: The play tells the story of five generations of a family, spanning 150 years of history in the Philippines and in the United States.

events.description: Performance by the UC Berkeley Symphony Orchestra, featuring Keiko Abe, Prism Rhapsody.

events.description: An opera performance of 'La Belle et la Bête.'

events.title: Funding and Programming Transportation Projects in California
events.description: A two-day class covering planning and preparing to delegate a task or project.

events.organizer: Rausser College of Natural Resources, UC Berkeley
events.description: Lecture on the mechanisms and evolution of nematode predation by carnivorous fungi.

events.organizer: Rausser College of Natural Resources, UC Berkeley
events.description: A guided exploration of methods for holding space for epistemic multiplicity.

events.organizer: Energy and Resources Group (ERG), UC Berkeley

events.organizer: Molecular and Cell Biology Department, UC Berkeley
events.location: Jarvis Auditorium, Grimes Engineering Center, UC Berkeley
events.description: A symposium honoring Professor Emeritus Jeremy Thorner, focusing on 'Saccharomyces cerevisiae: The Very Model of a Modern Model Organism.'
